name: codex-long-horizon-skill
description: Production-oriented Codex skills for long-running engineering work and AI video planning.

interface.shortDescription: Long-horizon engineering and AI video planning skills.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for evidence-backed engineering workflows, safe resumption, validation, PR handoff, and AI video planning artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use the long-horizon-engineering skill. Explore the repository, plan the change, validate it, and open a draft PR.
Use the ai-video-production skill. Create a video brief, storyboard, shot list, asset manifest, and render handoff using placeholder assets.
